headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 29, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 1-0 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Jonathan Aranda led the Rays' offense with a single that plated the game's only run. In other news, the Houston Astros fell to the Baltimore Orioles in a 3-5 showdown, with Shane Baz earning the win after 5.2 innings pitched. The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, with Elly De La Cruz leading the Reds' offense with a 3-hit, 4-RBI performance.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Javier Báez, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers due to a right ankle sprain. Casey Mize has also been placed on the 15-day injured list by the Tigers with a right adductor strain. Other notable injuries include Angel Zerpa's left forearm tightness, Jared Oliva's left wrist hamate fracture, Garrett Crochet's left shoulder inflammation, Everson Pereira's right pectoral strain, Pete Fairbanks' nerve irritation, and Garrett Acton's right shoulder strain.

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for cash. The Toronto Blue Jays also traded Willie MacIver to the Blue Jays for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings, while the Colorado Rockies traded Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out Guardians in Low-Scoring Affair**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 1-0 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Jonathan Aranda led the Rays' offense with a single that plated the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Orioles in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a 3-5 loss to the Baltimore Orioles, with Shane Baz earning the win after 5.2 innings pitched. Brice Matthews led the Orioles' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, including a key single that scored Dustin Harris.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Reds in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with a 3-hit, 4-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Pirates 11-7**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a convincing 11-7 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the charge at the plate. O'Hearn's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Chicago White Sox, marking their latest loss. Impact players for the White Sox included Vaughn Grissom and Everson Pereira, while Erick Fedde stood out on the mound.

top_news.title: **Orioles Shut Down Astros in Scoreless Tie**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 0-0 victory over the Houston Astros, marking a scoreless tie in the game.

top_news.title: **Tigers Place Javier Báez on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers shortstop Javier Báez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right ankle sprain. The injury occurred on an unspecified date.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire Tyler Fitzgerald in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald in a trade with the Toronto Blue Jays. The Blue Jays received cash in return.
